/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/spacely-app.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/spacely-app.dir/src/App.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/spacely-app.dir/src/MainFrame.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/spacely-app.dir/src/Document.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/spacely-app.dir/src/View.cpp.o" -o spacely-app  -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2
